description: Case 15: Export file - S3 comma-delimited CSV source with transforms to S3 gzip CSV
codeGenConfigurationNodes: {"node-1":{"S3CsvSource":{"AdditionalOptions":{"EnableSamplePath":false,"SamplePath":""},"Escaper":"\\","Exclusions":[],"Name":"S3 CSV Source - case15_export","OptimizePerformance":false,"OutputSchemas":[{"Columns":[]}],"Paths":["s3://gsb-ai-data-driven-data-nonprod-201064226169/preparing/case15_export_file/"],"QuoteChar":"quote","Recurse":true,"Separator":"comma","WithHeader":true}},"node-2":{"SparkSQL":{"Inputs":["node-1"],"Name":"SQL Query","OutputSchemas":[{"Columns":[]}],"SqlAliases":[{"Alias":"myDataSource","From":"node-1"}],"SqlQuery":"SELECT COALESCE(CAST(NULLIF(TRIM(animal_id), '') AS INT), 0) AS animal_id, COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(animal_name), ''), 'UNKNOWN') AS animal_name, CASE WHEN CAST(NULLIF(TRIM(age), '') AS INT) < 0 THEN 0 WHEN CAST(NULLIF(TRIM(age), '') AS INT) > 200 THEN NULL ELSE CAST(NULLIF(TRIM(age), '') AS INT) END AS age, COALESCE(TO_DATE(NULLIF(TRIM(date_of_birth), ''), 'yyyy-MM-dd'), TO_DATE('1900-01-01', 'yyyy-MM-dd')) AS date_of_birth, COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(location), ''), 'UNKNOWN') AS location FROM myDataSource"}},"node-3":{"S3DirectTarget":{"AutoDataQuality":{"IsEnabled":false},"Compression":"gzip","Format":"csv","Inputs":["node-2"],"Name":"S3 Gzip CSV Target - case15_export","NumberTargetPartitions":"0","PartitionKeys":[],"Path":"s3://gsb-ai-data-driven-data-nonprod-201064226169/staging/case15_export_file/load/","SchemaChangePolicy":{"EnableUpdateCatalog":false}}}}
